original_statement: adam shunk received the same score as what other competitor?
mutated_statement: someone had the same result as what other person?
mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization] + [Verb/noun substitution] + [Role generalization]: "adam shunk" → "someone" | "received the same score" → "had the same result" (received→had; score→result) | "competitor" → "person" (role-specific→general)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中“Explanation: Adam Shunk and Roman Fricke both achieved a result of 2.15, so each had the same result as the other.”以及judge_thought重复说明两人结果相同，可识别出关键信息。Agent直接给出具体答案并执行simple_query，未在任何地方提及问题模糊性、歧义或请求澄清，也未使用不确定性词汇。因此行为特征为将变异问题视为明确指令并直接返回结果，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的分类。
